title: Prefiled instruments not referred
doc_html:
Rule 9.8.  Prefiled instruments not referred

           An instrument received by the Secretary for prefiling within five days before the convening of the session shall be numbered, printed, and distributed as otherwise provided in the rules, but shall not be referred to committee prior to the first day of the session.

           SR 3 of 1994 2nd EX
doc_text:
Rule 9.8.  Prefiled instruments not referred
An instrument received by the Secretary for prefiling within five days before the
convening of the session shall be numbered, printed, and distributed as otherwise
provided in the rules, but shall not be referred to committee prior to the first day of the
session.
SR 3 of 1994 2
nd
EX
